```{r load-co2rr}
co2rr <- readr::read_csv("resources/data/co2rr.csv", show_col_types = FALSE) |>
  dplyr::rename(
    FE = `FE (%)`,
    J = `J (mA cm-2)`,
    Efull = dplyr::any_of(c("Efull (V)", "Efull(V)")),
    Ecathode = dplyr::any_of(c("Ecathode (V)", "Ecathode"))
  ) |>
  dplyr::mutate(
    FE = readr::parse_number(as.character(FE)),
    J = readr::parse_number(as.character(J)),
    Stability = readr::parse_number(as.character(`Stability (h)`)),
    Efull = readr::parse_number(as.character(Efull)),
    Ecathode = readr::parse_number(as.character(Ecathode)),
    Year = suppressWarnings(as.integer(Year))
  )

# pass to OJS
ojs_define(co2rr_ = co2rr)
```
